---
title: "Evan M. Eastman"
pagetitle: "Evan M. Eastman"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: files/profile.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 16em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:eeastman@wertheim.fsu.edu"
    - icon: building
      text: FSU RMI Center
      href: "https://business.fsu.edu/REPLACE"
    - text: "{{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar >}} Scholar"
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ksnlHLAAAAAJ&hl=en"
    - text: "{{< iconify ai ssrn >}} SSRN"
      href: "https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=2361505"
---

I am the Director of Research at the [Risk Management and Insurance Center](https://business.fsu.edu/REPLACE) at Florida State University, where I also serve as a faculty member in the Department of Risk Management/Insurance, Real Estate, and Legal Studies.

My research focuses on empirical insurance economics. Active areas include property/casualty loss reserving, Florida homeowners insurance markets and the role of state-sponsored insurers, reinsurance demand, enterprise risk management, and the application of large language models to insurance disclosure data.

I work regularly with NAIC, QUASR, and S&P/SNL data, and collaborate with industry and regulatory partners including the Florida Office of Insurance Regulation.

## Contact

Department of Risk Management/Insurance, Real Estate, and Legal Studies  
College of Business, Florida State University  
Tallahassee, FL  
[eeastman@wertheim.fsu.edu](mailto:eeastman@wertheim.fsu.edu)
